debug_info.goal:
r : ℝ
f : ℂ → ℂ
h : MeromorphicOn f ⊤
a : ℝ
⊢ MeromorphicOn (fun x => f (circleMap 0 r a) - circleMap 0 1 x) (uIcc 0 (2 * Real.pi))

proof:
intro x _
      apply AnalyticAt.meromorphicAt
      apply AnalyticAt.sub
      · exact analyticAt_const
      · exact analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 1 x trivial
failed_attempts:
apply MeromorphicOn.sub
      · apply meromorphicOn_const
      · apply MeromorphicOn.mono (analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 1).meromorphicOn
        simp

      exact MeromorphicAt.sub meromorphicAt_const (analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 1 x trivial).meromorphicAt
    sorry
  · sorry

        exact analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 1 x trivial

      · apply AnalyticAt.meromorphicAt
        exact analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 1 x trivial

      intro x _
      exact (AnalyticAt.sub analyticAt_const (analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 1 x trivial)).meromorphicAt

      · apply meromorphicAt_const
      · apply AnalyticAt.meromorphicAt
        exact analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 1 x trivial

apply MeromorphicOn.sub meromorphicOn_const
      apply AnalyticOnNhd.meromorphicOn
      exact (analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 1).mono (subset_univ _)

intro x _

    sorry
  · sorry
  · sorry

intro x _
      refine AnalyticAt.meromorphicAt ?_
      apply AnalyticAt.sub
      · fun_prop
      · exact (analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 1) x trivial
    set C := f (circleMap 0 r a)
    have hC : Meromorphic (fun _ : ℝ ↦ C) := meromorphicOn_const
    have hg : AnalyticOnNhd ℝ (circleMap 0 1) Set.univ := analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 1
    have := ρ₃ hC hg
    rw [MeasureTheory.integrable_prod_iff (ρ₂ hC fun x ↦ (hg x trivial).meromorphicAt)] at this
    exact this.1.of_forall (fun _ ↦ id) a
  · set F := fun x ↦ f (circleMap 0 r x)
    have hF : Meromorphic F := fun x ↦ (h (circleMap 0 r x) trivial).comp_analyticAt ((analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 r) x trivial)
    have hg : AnalyticOnNhd ℝ (circleMap 0 1) Set.univ := analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 1
    exact (MeasureTheory.integrable_prod_iff (ρ₃' h)).mp (ρ₃ hF hg) |>.2

intro x _
      apply AnalyticAt.meromorphicAt
      apply AnalyticAt.sub
      · fun_prop
      · apply analyticOnNhd_circleMap 0 1 x trivial
    sorry
